user.title: Govee BBQ Alarms
user.description: Pick your probe temperature sensors and the phone(s) to notify. No YAML required — everything else is created for you.

data_description.probes: Choose your live '...temperature_probe_N' sensors (not the alarm or battery ones). Selection order becomes Probe 1, 2, 3…
data_description.notify_services: Your Home Assistant Companion app service, e.g. mobile_app_pixel_9. Add more than one to alert several phones.

error.no_probes: Select at least one probe temperature sensor.
error.no_notify: Select at least one notify service. If none appear, install the Home Assistant app on your phone and sign in, then try again.

abort.already_configured: This BBQ device is already set up.

init.title: Govee BBQ options
init.description: Choose which apps get notified, the reminder cadence, and your presets.

data.notify_services: Notify service(s) — which apps/phones get alerts
data.presets_text: Presets — one per line: Name | high | low | category (low 0 = leave unchanged; category is one of Beef, Poultry, Fish, Pork, Other)

data_description.notify_services: Pick from your installed Home Assistant Companion apps (mobile_app_*). Add or remove phones anytime here.

set_notify_services.name: Set notify targets
set_notify_services.description: Choose which notify services receive this BBQ device's alerts.

entry_id.name: Device
entry_id.description: The Govee BBQ device's config entry id (the card fills this in for you).

notify_services.name: Notify services
notify_services.description: List of notify service names that should receive alerts (without the notify. prefix).

add_preset.name: Add preset
add_preset.description: Create or replace a target preset and assign it to a food category.

entry_id.name: Device
entry_id.description: The Govee BBQ device's config entry id (the card fills this in for you).

name.name: Name
name.description: Preset name, e.g. 'Turkey (165)'. Reusing a name replaces that preset.

high.name: High target
high.description: High target temperature (0 leaves the high target unchanged when applied).

low.name: Low target
low.description: Low target temperature (0 leaves the low target unchanged when applied).

category.name: Category
category.description: Food category: Beef, Poultry, Fish, Pork, or Other.

delete_preset.name: Delete preset
delete_preset.description: Remove a target preset by name.

entry_id.name: Device
entry_id.description: The Govee BBQ device's config entry id (the card fills this in for you).

name.name: Name
name.description: Name of the preset to remove.
